captions_normal: Audience member sitting calmly and listening to the presenter.

captions_anomalous: Audience member suddenly standing up and waving hands repeatedly.
Audience member standing on a chair.
Audience member shouting while waving both arms.
Audience member running down the aisle.
Audience member throwing a phone onto the floor.
Audience member pointing a phone camera very close to another person’s face.

Audience member tossing an object toward the presenter.
Audience member aggressively hitting the table or chair.
Audience member jumping repeatedly in front of the camera.
Audience member intentionally falling to the ground.
Audience member lying on the floor.
Audience member kicking a backpack across the floor.
Audience member dropping a laptop abruptly.
Audience member covering the camera lens.
Audience member staring directly into the camera very close to the lens.
